sections.sectionTitle: Suahtaksakna ding leh Mi khemte Suksiat ding Ngetna

verses.text: Pasian aw, ka thungetna hong ngai in la, ka hong thumna panin nangmah bu kei in
Keima lam hong nga in la, ka hong ngetna hong pia in. Ka lungsim gimna in kei hong zogawp ta hi
Migilote' sukcipna, galte' huging in kei hong gimsak hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute in keima tungah haksatna hong tun' uh a, hehna tawh keimah hong galbawl ding amaute in nuamsa uh hi
Ka sungah ka lungsim na mahmah a, sih ding launate kei tungah hong tungzo hi
Launa leh lin'na ka tungah hong tung a, launa in hong vukcip hi
Hih bangin ka ci hi: “Vakhu bangin kha nei hi leng! Ka leengkhia ding a, nuamtakin ka om hithiat ding hi
Gamla pekah ka vakthap ding a, gamsungah ka giak ding hi
Gensiatna huihpi leh huih husiate panin bukna ka zong pak ding hi,” ka ci hi
Topa aw, amau' geelnate suksiat sakin a pau uh kilamdangsak in. Bang hang hiam cih leh khua sungah ngongtatna leh kam kiselna ka mu hi
Amaute sun leh zanin kulhpi tungah kot paipai uh a, khua sungah siatna leh ngongtatnate om a, mite lakah lungkhamna om hi
Sumzuak sumleina mun panin kisukcipna leh kikhemnate venglo hi
Kei hong phin galte hilo hi. Hi leh ka thuakzo ding hi. Kiphatsakna tawh kei hong bawlte, langpang mi hilo hi. Hi leh ama kiang panin ka bu thei ding hi
Ahih hangin ka kikimpih, ka kikholhpih, ka lawm theih mahmah, nangmah na hi hi
Kam khum tawh i kihoho ngei a, Pasian' inn sungah i kikhawl khawm ngei hi
Amau' tungah sihna tungsak in. Leinuai-ah a hingtangin amaute paisuk sak in la, amaute launa lianpi tawh a han uhah paisak in
Ahih hangin keimah in Pasian' tungah ka ko a, Topa in kei hong hon ding hi
Nitak, zingsang, leh sunin ka gimna leh ka thumnate ama tungah ka gen a, amah in keima thumna aw, hong za ding hi
Amah in ka galsimna sungah kei hong kem ding a, a muan'huai munah kei hong koih ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh keimah a hong do dingin mi tampi tak kigual deudau uh hi
Tanglai pek panin kumpi-in a kikoih Pasian in za-in amaute niamkhiat ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute in thukham zuilo uh a, Pasian zahtaklo uh hi
Ka kikholhpih ngei mi in a lawmte langpangin sugawp a, a thuciamna palsat hi
Ama kampau, thawhbat sangin nelzaw a, ahi zongin a lung sungah muhdahna om hi. A kammalte sathau sangin nipzaw a, ahi zongin tuate pen namsau hiam mahmah tawh kibang hi
Topa tungah na vangik nga in, amah in hong huh ding hi. Amah in mi thumante kilingsak ngeilo ding hi
Ahih hangin Pasian aw, dum thuk penna munah amaute na lawnsuk ding a, mi thatte leh mi khemte pen amau nuntak ding zah lang hinglo ding uh hi. Ahih hangin keimah in nang ka hong muang ding hi.
